summary: Iteration 69: Verified Payments & Payouts section in Settings page and StripeGateModal functionality. All backend APIs (GET /api/stripe/status, POST /api/stripe/connect) working correctly. Frontend Settings page shows 5 sections: Profile, Newsletter (The Weekly Wax), Payments & Payouts, Help & Support, Account. StripeGateModal correctly shows 'go to settings' button and navigates to /settings.

issues: RadixUI accessibility warnings: Missing DialogTitle/Description in some modals

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/stripe/status returns {stripe_connected: bool, stripe_account_id: str|null} - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/stripe/status returns stripe_connected=false for test user - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/stripe/connect returns {url: str, account_id: str} structure - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/platform-fee returns platform_fee_percent (public endpoint) - PASSED
Frontend: Settings page loads with 'Settings' h1 title - PASSED
Frontend: Settings has Profile section - PASSED
Frontend: Settings has Newsletter section (data-testid='newsletter-settings-card') - PASSED
Frontend: Settings has Payments & Payouts section (data-testid='payments-settings-card') - PASSED
Frontend: Settings has Help & Support section (data-testid='help-support-card') - PASSED
Frontend: Settings has Account section with logout/delete buttons - PASSED
Frontend: Payments section shows 'Not connected' status for users without Stripe - PASSED
Frontend: Payments section shows 'Connect Stripe' button (data-testid='stripe-connect-btn') - PASSED
Frontend: StripeGateModal appears when clicking 'List a Record' without Stripe connected - PASSED
Frontend: StripeGateModal button text is 'go to settings' - PASSED
Frontend: StripeGateModal 'go to settings' navigates to /settings - PASSED
Frontend: StripeGateModal shows 'maybe later' dismiss option - PASSED

payments_payouts_section.description: Settings page has dedicated Payments & Payouts card with Stripe connection status
elements_verified: Description: 'connect Stripe to sell records and receive payouts.'
Status: 'Not connected' for users without Stripe

stripe_gate_modal.description: StripeGateModal shows when trying to list without Stripe connected
elements_verified: Modal appears on 'List a Record' click

stripe_api_endpoints.description: Stripe Connect API endpoints working correctly

critical_code_review_comments: All features implemented correctly as specified
Payments & Payouts section has proper data-testid attributes for testing
StripeGateModal correctly navigates to Settings (not directly initiating Stripe)
Stripe status endpoint properly checks stripe_charges_enabled for connection status
RadixUI accessibility warnings should be addressed for better screen reader support
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 69 verified Payments & Payouts feature in Settings. Settings page now has 5 sections: Profile, Newsletter (The Weekly Wax), Payments & Payouts, Help & Support, Account. Test user direct66 is NOT connected to Stripe (stripe_connected=false). StripeGateModal appears when trying to list records and correctly navigates to /settings with 'go to settings' button. External image CDNs (Discogs) still returning 403 errors - this is rate limiting issue, not app bug. Backend Stripe endpoints require auth and return proper structure.
